profile.name: Uday
profile.title: UI/UX Design Apprentice
profile.tagline: "Not all treasure is silver and gold, mate." Charting courses through digital seas.
profile.bio: A first-year design student crewing the great pirate ship of UX. Every interface is a treasure map; every user, a navigator looking for safe harbour.
profile.personalTouch: When I'm not sketching wireframes I read pirate folklore, hunt vintage typography, and try to recreate Caribbean sunset palettes in Figma.
profile.goals: Build a portfolio of swashbuckling case studies; learn motion design properly; intern at a small studio that values craft over scale.
